hero_subtitle: Join the Shinners Precious School Family | 2026 Enrollment Now Open

why_enroll.title: CBC Curriculum
why_enroll.description: Fully implemented Competency Based Curriculum with trained teachers.

why_enroll.title: Digital Literacy & French
why_enroll.description: ICT skills from Grade 1 and French from Grade 4.

why_enroll.title: Safe Transport
why_enroll.description: Reliable school transport covering major Embakasi routes.

why_enroll.title: Holistic Development
why_enroll.description: Sports, clubs, music, drama, and co-curricular activities.

testimonials.quote: Shinners Precious School has transformed our child's confidence and academic performance. The teachers are dedicated and caring.
testimonials.author: Mrs. Wanjiku, Parent of Grade 4 Learner

testimonials.quote: The CBC implementation is excellent. My child loves the digital literacy classes and French lessons.
testimonials.author: Mr. Otieno, Parent of Grade 6 Learner

testimonials.quote: Affordable fees, great transport system, and wonderful Christian values. Best decision we made.
testimonials.author: Mr. Kamau, Parent of PP2 Learner

visit_message: Visit Shinners Precious School for a tour and meet our teachers.

steps.title: Visit School
steps.description: Visit Shinners Precious School in Embakasi for a tour and initial consultation.

steps.title: Collect Form
steps.description: Collect and fill the admission form from the school office.

steps.title: Submit Documents
steps.description: Submit required documents with the completed form.

steps.title: Pay Admission Fee
steps.description: Pay KSh 1,000 admission fee via bank or Mpesa.

steps.title: Confirmation
steps.description: Receive admission confirmation and reporting instructions.

faqs.question: Is there an entrance exam?
faqs.answer: For transfer learners only. We conduct a simple assessment to place your child in the appropriate grade level.

faqs.question: Can fees be paid in installments?
faqs.answer: Yes. Please contact the school administration to discuss installment arrangements.

faqs.question: Do you provide transport?
faqs.answer: Yes. We cover Imara Daima, Pipeline, AA & KOBIL, and Kwanjenga routes. Transport is optional.

faqs.question: Do you provide meals?
faqs.answer: Yes, optional meals program at KSh 3,900 per term. Nutritious lunch served daily.

faqs.question: When can admissions be done?
faqs.answer: Admissions are open throughout the year, subject to vacancy availability.

payment_info: Payment via KCB Bank or Lipa Na Mpesa. No cash payments accepted.
